# Think Fostering - llms.txt
# https://thinkfostering.co.uk

> Think Fostering is a UK fostering comparison platform that helps prospective and existing foster carers find, compare and connect with Ofsted-registered fostering agencies across England. The site provides comprehensive guides to fostering, eligibility, the assessment process, allowances, types of fostering and transferring between agencies.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/): Main landing page and hub
- [Fostering Guide](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering.html): Complete guide to foster care in England
- [What Is Fostering?](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/what-is-fostering.html): Explanation of foster care
- [Why Foster?](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/why-become-a-foster-carer.html): Reasons to become a foster carer
- [Types of Fostering](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/types-of-fostering.html): Short-term, long-term, emergency, respite, therapeutic, parent and child
- [Can I Foster?](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/can-i-foster.html): Eligibility requirements
- [Become a Foster Carer](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/how-to-become-a-foster-carer.html): Step-by-step guide
- [The Fostering Process](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-process.html): From enquiry to approval
- [Form F Assessment](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-form-f-assessment.html): Assessment process explained
- [Fostering Allowances](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-allowance-payment-for-fostering.html): Pay, fees and tax relief
- [Fostering vs Adoption](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-vs-adoption.html): Key differences between fostering and adoption
- [Transfer Agency](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/transfer-fostering-agency.html): How to switch fostering agency
- [FAQs](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/faqs.html): Frequently asked questions
- [Find an Agency](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/find-an-agency.html): Search and compare agencies
- [Contact](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/contact.html): Get in touch

## Regional Pages
- [North West](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-agency-north-west.html): Manchester, Liverpool, Lancashire, Merseyside
- [Yorkshire & Humber](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-in-yorkshire.html): Bradford, Sheffield, Doncaster, York, Harrogate
- [North East](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-in-north-east.html): Newcastle, Sunderland, Gateshead, Durham, Darlington, Middlesbrough, Stockton
- [South East](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-in-south-east.html): Brighton, Canterbury, Southampton, Portsmouth, Oxford, Reading
- [London](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-in-london.html): Croydon, Lewisham, Tower Hamlets, Newham, Barnet, Enfield
- [West Midlands](https://thinkfostering.co.uk/fostering-in-birmingham.html): Birmingham, Coventry, Wolverhampton, Dudley

## Key Facts
- Approximately 54,800 children live in foster care in England
- Around 67% of looked-after children are placed in foster care
- Independent fostering agency allowances typically range from £450 to £860 per week
- Most fostering income is tax-free under HMRC Qualifying Care Relief
- The fostering assessment process typically takes 4-8 months
- All foster carers have the right to transfer between agencies

- For Agencies: /for-agencies - Information for fostering agencies wanting to list on Think Fostering
- Privacy Policy: /privacy-policy - How we collect and handle personal data
- Terms of Use: /terms-of-use - Terms and conditions for using the Think Fostering website
